## Summary

Integrate **Vaquita** savings protocol on Stellar so ZCore receives credit events for community savings behavior. This issue covers product alignment, technical integration, and verification â€” **Vaquita has no public partner REST API**, so coordination with their team and on-chain tx parsing are required.

---

## Important: product model alignment

ZCore Model B currently defines Vaquita events as **ROSCA / tanda** semantics:

| ZCore event | Max score | Intended meaning |
|-------------|-----------|------------------|
| `tanda_round_paid` | 30 | Monthly round paid on time |
| `tanda_cycle_completed` | 100 | Full cycle completed without default |

**Vaquita on Stellar today** (per public docs / SCF) is primarily **gamified save-to-earn**:
- Period pools (7d, 3m, 6m)
- Early withdrawal penalties
- Yield via Blend + DeFindex integrations
- Contract methods: `deposit`, `withdraw` (not classic rotating tanda rounds)

**Before coding:** Confirm with Vaquita team which events map to ZCore scoring:

| Option | Approach |
|--------|----------|
| A | Keep `tanda_*` events; wait for Vaquita ROSCA product on Stellar |
| B | Add new event types (e.g. `savings_period_completed`) for current Vaquita |
| C | Map "completed 6m period without early withdraw" â†’ `tanda_cycle_completed` |

Document chosen mapping in `Docs/integrations/vaquita.md`.

---

## Vaquita reference

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| App | https://app.vaquita.fi |
| SCF submission | https://communityfund.stellar.org/dashboard/submissions/recf0kKLHyFBwSHmL |
| Testnet contract (example) | `CDKCKHTRKFJXVKLICHPIXAPLIVDRBDQEEGJYDKFOTUV35APVNOGTWZW7` ([lab link](https://lab.stellar.org/r/testnet/contract/CDKCKHTRKFJXVKLICHPIXAPLIVDRBDQEEGJYDKFOTUV35APVNOGTWZW7)) |
| Integrations | Blend USDC yield, DeFindex, Anclap onboarding |

No documented webhook for third parties â€” same integration patterns as #17 (TW) and #18 (Blend).

---

## ZCore event payload (if using current schema)

**Round paid:**
```json
{
  "apiKey": "<vaquita_platform_key>",
  "eventType": "tanda_round_paid",
  "walletAddress": "G...",
  "amount": 100,
  "currency": "USDC",
  "txHash": "...",
  "timestamp": "..."
}
```

**Cycle completed:**
```json
{
  "eventType": "tanda_cycle_completed",
  ...
}
```

Platform registration:
```bash
POST /api/platforms/register
{ "platformId": "vaquita", "name": "Vaquita", ... }
```

Dev seed key: `dev_vaquita_key_local` (#5)

---

## Implementation tasks

### Phase 0 â€” Discovery

- [ ] Contact Vaquita team (Discord / SCF / app.vaquita.fi)
- [ ] Confirm Stellar contract addresses (testnet + mainnet)
- [ ] Agree event mapping (tanda vs savings period)
- [ ] Determine who calls ZCore (Vaquita backend vs ZCore indexer)

### Phase 1 â€” Testnet PoC

- [ ] User completes savings action on Vaquita testnet
- [ ] Capture relevant txHash
- [ ] Register wallet in ZCore dapp
- [ ] POST event with `dev_vaquita_key_local`
- [ ] Verify history + score impact

### Phase 2 â€” Verification

- [ ] `Server/src/services/verify/vaquita.verify.ts`
- [ ] Allowlist Vaquita contract IDs
- [ ] Parse deposit/withdraw or period-complete from Soroban events
- [ ] Do not accept arbitrary successful txs (#17/#18 same gap)

### Phase 3 â€” Documentation

- [ ] `Docs/integrations/vaquita.md` with mapping table, contract IDs, examples
- [ ] Update dashboard empty state copy if event labels change

---

## ZCore processing (existing)

**File:** `Server/src/controllers/events.controller.ts`

Scoring caps for Vaquita events (`scoring.service.ts`):
- `tanda_round_paid`: max 30 pts
- `tanda_cycle_completed`: max 100 pts

Anti-Sybil: 30-day wallet age, 10 events/month cap, counterparty decay, unique txHash.

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Written agreement on event mapping (comment on this issue or doc)
- [ ] At least one testnet event scored correctly
- [ ] `GET /api/user/{wallet}/history` shows Vaquita-labeled event
- [ ] Vaquita-specific tx verification implemented
- [ ] Integration guide in `Docs/integrations/vaquita.md`
- [ ] Production platform key (not dev seed) for mainnet

---

## Dependencies

- #15 production DB
- #17 or #18 as integration template
- Preferably clarified product model before mainnet
